time.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
time.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
time.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

errors.INVALID_TRANSITION: This can’t be done anymore because the record changed. Check the record again.
errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: Your account doesn’t have permission to do this.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Something isn’t filled in right. Please check the form.
errors.DEVICE_NOT_ENROLLED: This device isn’t enrolled yet. Enroll it first.
errors.USER_DEACTIVATED: Your account has been deactivated. Contact the store owner.
errors.PIN_RATE_LIMITED: Too many wrong PIN tries. Wait a moment, then try again.
errors.PIN_LOCKED: PIN locked. Ask the store owner to unlock it or set a new PIN.
errors.LAST_ADMIN_PROTECTED: Not allowed. There must always be at least one active main owner.
errors.ROLE_IN_USE: This role is still assigned to users, so it can’t be removed yet. Unassign it from everyone first.
errors.IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT: This request clashed with an earlier one. Try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment, then try again.
errors.NETWORK: Connection problem. Your changes are still saved on this device.

rejection.BAD_SIGNATURE: This change failed verification and was rejected by the server. Report this to the store owner.
rejection.CHAIN_BROKEN: This device’s change history is broken. Sending has stopped. Contact the store owner right away.
rejection.CHAIN_GAP: Some changes were missing. They’re being resent automatically.
rejection.CHAIN_HALTED: On hold because an earlier change has a problem.
rejection.DEVICE_REVOKED: This device has been revoked, so the change was rejected. Enroll this device again.
rejection.SCHEMA_INVALID: The server didn’t recognize this change’s format. This is an app problem — report it to the store owner.
rejection.SCOPE_VIOLATION: This change doesn’t belong to this store or account, so it was rejected. Report it to the store owner.
rejection.UNKNOWN_TYPE: This device’s app needs an update before this change can be sent.
